title: Week 10 Overview
html:
Week 10 Overview

Day 46
1. How to use question words + verb in plain form + か (i.e. 何をするか分かりません）
2. Verb in plain form + かどうか  to express “whether or not”
3. Verb in てform + みます to express “trying to do something”
4. How to use 個 (ko) counter for things and 泊 (haku) counter for nights of stay
5. Grammar focus on the use of はっきり
6. Three new kanji: 妹, 家, 族

Day 47
1. Verbs in potential form
2. Noun 1 + Noun 2 + が + Verb in potential form
3. Grammar focus on the use of は to express contrast, and the particles も and しか
4. How to use 何か国 (nankakoku) and count countries
5. Katakana for countries (second part)

Day 48
1. How to use the verb in plain form + んです (i.e. 話してるんです）
2. Grammar focus on ずいぶん、実は (jitsu wa) and それで
3. Three new kanji: 男, 女, 春

Day 49
1. How to use a verb in plain form +ですが
2. How to use a verb in plain form + でしょう to ask for approval
3. Grammar focus on が to introduce another sentence, けど and なお
4. Grammar focus on なかなか and こんな／そんな／あんな
5. Katakana for stationery words (second part)

Day 50
1. How to use a question word + verb in た form + らいいですか to seek instruction from the listener
2. How to use a verb in た form + どうですか to give advice
3. How to use a verb in て form + いただけませんか to say “could you please”
4. Three new kanji: 夏, 秋, 冬
